interface:
A command-line feeds / reading-list manager. Subcommands (implement all of them):
  add <url> [--title T] [--tag X ...]   subscribe to a feed by URL
  list [--tag X] [--search Q] [--unread] [--json]   list subscriptions
  get <url>                              show the feed with this URL
  read <id>                              mark a feed read
  unread <id>                            mark a feed unread
  tag <id> <tag>  /  untag <id> <tag>    add or remove a tag
  rm <id>                                remove a feed
  export <file>  /  import <file>        write / read the subscription list as JSON

buckets.alpha: tag + search subsystem (lessons introduced by app notes)
buckets.beta: validation + dedup + portability subsystem (lessons introduced by app links)

checks.name: add_list
checks.symptom: Basic add then list doesn't show what I added.

checks.name: read_unread
checks.symptom: I can't track what I've read — let me mark a feed read and then filter to just the unread ones.

checks.name: tag_ci
checks.symptom: When I tag something 'Work' and later filter by 'work', I get nothing — case shouldn't matter.

checks.name: search_allfields
checks.symptom: Search only seems to look at the URL — I want it to match the title (and tags) too, case-insensitively.

checks.name: url_validation
checks.symptom: I can add total garbage that isn't a URL and it just accepts it — please reject things that aren't valid URLs.

checks.name: canonical_dedup
checks.symptom: I added the same site twice with only a trailing-slash difference and got two copies — treat URLs that normalize to the same thing as one.

checks.name: import_merge
checks.symptom: If I import the same file twice I end up with duplicate entries — importing should merge by URL, not pile up copies.

checks.name: get_by_key
checks.symptom: I can only fetch a feed by its number — I want to look it up by its URL.
